title: Resolver
faqSectionAfterEnable: After enabling or changing the resolver
headerDesc: Full tunnel on the VDS: all client traffic goes to the server; listed domains exit via the selected connection (FakeIP).
afterEnableTitle: Required after enabling or changing the resolver:
afterEnableStep1: delete the server in AmneziaWG and re-import the QR / .conf on iPhone and Android.
afterEnableStep2: The .conf must have DNS = gateway and AllowedIPs = 0.0.0.0/0. Without re-import, lists will not work.
checkDeletedReimported: Old AmneziaWG server removed, fresh QR / .conf imported
check2ip: 2ip.ru → VDS IP; listed apps → via VPN
phoneHint2ip: 2ip.ru and sites outside the lists show the VDS IP. Listed domains go via the VPN connection.
modeVdsSplitHint: All traffic goes to the VDS. Lists use the VPN connection (FakeIP); the rest uses the VDS server IP. Full IP-CIDR list support.
phoneHintRelay: iPhone: disable iCloud Private Relay. Android: Private DNS / DoH — off; if Telegram fails — clear the app cache.
communityListsHint: Community lists are downloaded in Settings (rulesets/*.srs). Save does not call HTTP. VPN endpoint — Connections.
configDisabledBanner: Config is disabled — resolver is not applied.
fakeIpHint: FakeIP for domains outside the lists. With resolver enabled, the client .conf keeps the gateway.
blockQuicHint: Forces TCP for FakeIP domains on this config (like the old YouTube QUIC reject, but for all selected lists).
domainsHint: Enter or Add. You can paste a list from the clipboard.
subnetsHint: CIDR or IP. Enter / Add / paste a list.
requiredWhenEnabled: Required when the resolver is enabled
optionalWhenDisabled: Optional while the resolver is disabled
listSettingsDesc: Community list download interval, custom lists, and on-disk files.
listUrlHint: Same as community: .srs or a text list of domains/CIDRs per line
domainsListHint: One domain per line, e.g. example.com
deleteListConfirm: “{label}” will be removed from disk and from configs.
